Salads · Lunch
Tropical Quinoa Salad
A vibrant mix of quinoa, roasted pumpkin, pineapple and fresh mint tossed with a zesty tahini-lime vinaigrette
GF V
FJD$32
Price
1×
Portions
15 min
Prep
20 min
Cook
Lunch
Service
Ingredients
IngredientUnitQty
Base
Quinoa, cookedg120
Salad
Pumpkin, roasted and dicedg80
Fresh pineapple, dicedg60
Herb
Fresh mint, torng8.0
Dressing
Tahinig20
Lime juice, freshml20
Honeyg10
Method
1
Cook quinoa per packet instructions. Cool completely.
2
Dice pumpkin 2 cm cubes. Roast at 190°C with olive oil 20 min until tender.
3
Whisk tahini, lime juice, olive oil and honey to smooth dressing. Season.
4
Combine quinoa, cooled pumpkin, pineapple, and mint.
5
Toss with dressing. Plate and serve.
Plating Notes
Serve in bowl or flat plate. Mint leaves on top. Lime wedge on side.
Equipment
Saucepan · Oven · Roasting tray · Mixing bowl
Allergens
SESAME TREE NUTS
GLUTEN DAIRY EGGS PEANUTS SHELLFISH FISH SOY CELERY MUSTARD LUPIN MOLLUSCS SULPHITES
